rag_rules: Place AGREE assumptions and guarantees in component type scopes when they refer to ports or interface behavior.
Use annex agree {** ... **}; blocks for AGREE contracts, with component type annexes for assumptions and guarantees.
generic_rules: Only include bounds or relations explicitly stated in the requirement within AGREE contracts.
Ensure AGREE expressions use types and identifiers that are visible in the AADL model scope.
Do not introduce invented constraints or assumptions not directly supported by the requirement or model.
Write deterministic dependency guarantees that relate visible inputs to visible outputs.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts must be enclosed in annex agree {** ... **}; blocks.
Use eq declarations for helper boolean expressions in AGREE contracts.
Constants and equations in AGREE should be declared in component type scopes for interface contracts.
anti_patterns: Do not place implementation-level bindings or assignments in component type annexes.
Avoid generating assumptions or guarantees that reference AADL properties as AGREE variables.
Do not assume numeric bounds for ports unless explicitly stated in the requirement or model.
irrelevant_topics: AADL package references and with clauses
